heading: Background
body:
LangChain is an open-source framework that simplifies the creation of
LLM applications through the use of "chains." Chains are LangChain-specific
components that can be combined for a variety of AI use cases, including
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).

By integrating MongoDB Vector Search with LangChain, you can use
MongoDB as a vector database and use MongoDB Vector Search to
implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) by retrieving semantically similar documents
from your data. To learn more about RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation),
see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](ai-key-concepts).
